features: Kids Jungle Animal Party Bags: You will get 12 animal gift bags in the package, each drawstring bag designed with a unique jungle animal and printed its name, which can help children to recognize little animals better. The animal print is so cute and can go with so many different kids' party themes. Pretty strong to hold toys, candies, and any other gifts as party favor bags, goody bags or loot bags.

Quality PE Bags: Made of Polyester fabric, not easily fray, super sturdy and lightweight, doesn’t add much heaviness when used by kids. Full of vibrant colors, beautiful bold print on the double side. Rip resistant, machine washable and no fade. Fitting well to kids’ backs without bobbing around when carried. If your kids feel uncomfortable, just adjust the drawstring with their little hands.

Perfect Size & Double-Side Design: Each reusable party bag measures 9.7 x 12 inches, perfect size for boys and girls. These animal drawstring bags look so cool, double-side animal printed with vivid colors and natural backgrounds that your child and even you will love. Coordinate these animal string bags with other party supplies to create an eye-catching color scheme.

Perfect For Party Favors: These cute animal party bags would be ideal for kids goodie bags at any theme party. Also, with the help of these backpack bags, you can carry a bunch of nice fun toys, candies and books on short trips for your kids. Kids will absolutely love receiving these personalized drawstring bags and be delighted to find out what awaits inside. Bring a lot of fun to your party or event.

Suitable for Multiple Occasions: Our animal bags are perfect for various occasions. These are great for gift bags for a kid’s birthday, baby shower, jungle safari themed parties. Pair them with a variety of party favors to create surprise on children's birthdays! Also, they are the perfect choice for daily use after the party. Could easily be used as sack bags, drawstring Gym Bags, Drawstring bags for sport, travel, swimming, camping and Various Activities, holidays etc.
description: Product Description COUNTING DOWN TO YOUR CHILD’S JUNGLE ANIMAL BIRTHDAY PARTY! Mocoosy drawstring party favor bags come in popular little jungle animal prints so that they will match all your jungle animal theme party decorations perfectly and are sure to be a big hit! These jungle animal bags are durable enough and corresponding for kids' size! Kids can reuse them to carry around snacks or their favorite toys in daily life. KEY FEATURES: 12 different designs, each bag has a unique design. Full of vibrant colors, beautiful bold print on the double side. Made of high quality polyester fabric, super sturdy and lightweight. Rip resistant, not easily to fray. Adjustable strings and secure stitching. SUITABLE OCCASION: They are perfect for birthday parties, baby showers, school classroom parties, jungle animal parties, and can also be used as snack bags, toy bags, book bags, pool bags, beach bags. MACHINE WASHABLE, QUICK DRY Mocoosy jungle animal candy bags are made of polyester fabric, lightweight and not easy to fray, well sewn make them rip resistant and super sturdy. Machine washable and colorfast. Its vibrant colors are not affected even after machine washing. PERFECT SIZE JUNGLE ANIMAL STORAGE BAGS Each jungle animal party favor bag measures 9.7 x 12 inches, suitable for little boys and girls. They hold good sized items so you can actually put some books or some small jungle animal toys in them. Fitting well to kids’ backs without bobbing around when carried. STURDY AND DURABLE MATERIAL Made of Polyester fabric, not easily to fray, super sturdy and lightweight, doesn’t add much heaviness and bulk when used by kids. Beautiful bold print on the double side with full of vibrant colors.
